code: export const PRIORITIES=["Low","Medium","High"];export const STATUSES=["Open","In Progress","Completed"];export const PRIORITY_META={Low:{label:"Low",color:"var(--c-low)"},Medium:{label:"Medium",color:"var(--c-medium)"},High:{label:"High",color:"var(--c-high)"}};export const STATUS_META={Open:{label:"Open",icon:"◎"},"In Progress":{label:"In Progress",icon:"◑"},Completed:{label:"Completed",icon:"●"}};export function formatDate(iso){return new Date(iso).toLocaleDateString("en-US",{year:"numeric",month:"short",day:"numeric"});}
